1.1_purpose.label: 1.1 Purpose
1.1_purpose.instruction: Identify the product whose software requirements are specified in this document, including the revision or release number. Describe the scope of the product that is covered by this SRS, particularly if this SRS describes only part of the system or a single subsystem.

1.2_conventions.label: 1.2 Document Conventions
1.2_conventions.instruction: Describe any standards or typographical conventions that were followed when writing this SRS, such as fonts or highlighting that have special significance.

1.3_audience.label: 1.3 Intended Audience and Reading Suggestions
1.3_audience.instruction: Describe the different types of reader that the document is intended for. Suggest a sequence for reading the document.

1.4_scope.label: 1.4 Project Scope
1.4_scope.instruction: Provide a short description of the software being specified and its purpose, including relevant benefits, objectives, and goals.

1.5_references.label: 1.5 References
1.5_references.instruction: List any other documents or Web addresses to which this SRS refers.

2.1_perspective.label: 2.1 Product Perspective
2.1_perspective.instruction: Describe the context and origin of the product. Is it a follow-on member of a product family, a replacement, or a new product?

2.2_features.label: 2.2 Product Features
2.2_features.instruction: Summarize the major features the product contains or the significant functions that it performs.

2.3_user_classes.label: 2.3 User Classes and Characteristics
2.3_user_classes.instruction: Identify the various user classes that you anticipate will use this product based on expertise, privilege levels, etc.

2.4_operating_env.label: 2.4 Operating Environment
2.4_operating_env.instruction: Describe the environment in which the software will operate (hardware, OS, versions).

2.5_constraints.label: 2.5 Design and Implementation Constraints
2.5_constraints.instruction: Describe any items or issues that will limit the options available to the developers.

2.6_user_docs.label: 2.6 User Documentation
2.6_user_docs.instruction: List the user documentation components (manuals, help, tutorials) that will be delivered.

2.7_assumptions.label: 2.7 Assumptions and Dependencies
2.7_assumptions.instruction: List any assumed factors that could affect the requirements (third-party components, external factors).

3_system_features.title: 3. System Features
3_system_features.instruction: Organize the functional requirements for the product by system features.

features.3.1.1_priority: Provide a short description and indicate priority (High, Medium, Low).
features.3.1.2_stimulus: List sequences of user actions and system responses.

4.1_user_interfaces.label: 4.1 User Interfaces
4.1_user_interfaces.instruction: Describe the logical characteristics of each interface between the software and the users.

4.2_hardware_interfaces.label: 4.2 Hardware Interfaces
4.2_hardware_interfaces.instruction: Describe the logical and physical characteristics of each interface with hardware components.

4.3_software_interfaces.label: 4.3 Software Interfaces
4.3_software_interfaces.instruction: Describe connections to other software components (databases, tools, libraries).

4.4_comm_interfaces.label: 4.4 Communications Interfaces
4.4_comm_interfaces.instruction: Describe requirements associated with communication functions (email, web browser, protocols).

5.1_performance.label: 5.1 Performance Requirements
5.1_performance.instruction: State performance requirements under various circumstances and explain rationale.

5.2_safety.label: 5.2 Safety Requirements
5.2_safety.instruction: Specify requirements concerned with possible loss, damage, or harm.

5.3_security.label: 5.3 Security Requirements
5.3_security.instruction: Specify requirements regarding security or privacy issues and authentication.

5.4_quality_attributes.label: 5.4 Software Quality Attributes
5.4_quality_attributes.instruction: Specify characteristics like adaptability, availability, correctness, maintainability, etc.

6_other_requirements.title: 6. Other Requirements
6_other_requirements.instruction: Define any other requirements not covered elsewhere (legal, internationalization).
